rows.label: qev018101_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Hey, you there? What if you
could deploy an advantageous
field in a combat zone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0002
rows.name:
For example, if you could recover Doll fuel
more quickly... Don't you think you could
advance the battle situation quite favorably?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say it would be quite convenient if
such a thing were truly possible.

rows.label: qev018101_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Laugh, saying there's no way
such a dream-like story exists.

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Right? It's a dream-like device from
the perspective of you BLADEs[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0004
rows.name:
A dream[ST:wide ]— Not a bad expression. It
means I have realized that dream.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0005
rows.name:
The Battle Data Probe! That's the name of the
device I was building aboard the White Whale.
I don't have any on hand right now, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Let me explain the mechanism. By dynamically
converting the trace amounts of electromagnetic
waves flowing through the Frontier Net...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0007
rows.name:
It allows you to construct a
unique battle field in the
surrounding area where it's installed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Say, don't you want to
try using it right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0009
rows.name:
If these are distributed to the BLADEs,
the front lines will change drastically![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev018101_SEL0031
rows.name: Show interest in the Battle Data Probe.

rows.label: qev018101_JNK0040
rows.name: Indifference

rows.label: qev018101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say you have no intention of
relying on such a machine.

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Right? In that case, I
have a favor to ask you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0011
rows.name:
...That's because you haven't tasted
the power of the Battle Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Use it once, and you won't be
able to fight without this device.
Just listen to my request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0013
rows.name:
To make this, a massive amount
of Miranium is required.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0014
rows.name:
But despite running around everywhere, every
corporation is so busy just producing their own
products that they won't lend a hand to my development.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Isn't it a foolish story? Looking only
at the sales right in front of them and
throwing away this brilliant potential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Therefore, I want you to gather
10000gm of Miranium for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0017
rows.name:
The reward is, of course, a
Battle Data Probe. How about
it? Not a bad deal, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0018
rows.name:
That's right, that's good. Then hurry
up and gather the Miranium for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0019
rows.name:
The blueprint that flashed in my mind
the moment we reached this land of
Mira, I shall give it form right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Every corporation only looks at the
products right in front of them and has
continued to ignore my research... but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Just watch! Soon every BLADE
will be wanting this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0022
rows.name:
If I just have Miranium, I can
revive the Battle Data Probe right
away! Hurry up and get it for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0023
rows.name: How is it? Did you get the Miranium?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Come on, let me give form
to the Battle Data Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_JNK0050
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev018101_SEL0051
rows.name: Hand over 10000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev018101_JNK0060
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev018101_SEL0061
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0025
rows.name: With this much[ST:wide ]— I can do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Wait right there. I'll make
it for you right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0027
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—It's complete! I have
finally accomplished it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0028
rows.name:
This is the Battle Data Probe!
The Doll Fuel Recovery Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0029
rows.name:
In a zone where this is installed,
you can recover the fuel of parked
Dolls much more quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Here, take it! Go prove that my
invention is more useful than the
weapons developed by any corporation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Yes, and[ST:wide ]—protect the people living
in this NLA! I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I can make even more Battle Data
Probes! I want to revive the
prototypes I made before coming here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Please talk to me again. To revive the
Battle Data Probes, the cooperation
of a BLADE like you is necessary![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0034
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Hm? What are you putting on airs for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Hurry up and let me start
producing the Battle Data Probe.[ST:wait ]
